metadata.description: SoloHQ: the command center for a one-person business. Part of the Sovereign Agency OS. Installs a local AI operating system that knows your voice, your business, and your goals.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: The SoloHQ core: sets up your vault, your memory, and your assistant, then runs the AI Identity Blueprint so it sounds like you. The free foundation of the Sovereign Agency OS.
